notableEvents.label: Zack Gelof GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof grounds into a double play, second baseman Michael Massey to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Nick Loftin. Carlos Cortes out at 2nd. Zack Gelof out at 1st.
